positive: A whimsical and vibrant circular mandala design featuring stylized constellations, cosmic nebulas, and minimalist celestial creatures like glowing lunar foxes and gentle star-shooting dragons. The design should have thick, bold lines and high contrast, perfect for a modern, abstract t-shirt print. Use a palette of deep indigo, brilliant sapphire blue, ethereal silver, and pop accents of lavender and gold. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, memorable silhouette. Inspired by Art Deco geometry and cosmic whimsy, ultra-detailed vector art, flat lay style, suitable for apparel printing.
